title: Integration I: Reversing Differentiation
description: Integration as the reverse process of differentiation: finding indefinite integrals of powers of x, the constant of integration, and evaluating definite integrals to find the area under a curve.
objectives: Recognise integration as the reverse of differentiation and integrate terms of the form ax^n
Find the constant of integration C using a given point on the curve
Evaluate definite integrals using the fundamental theorem of calculus
Interpret a definite integral as the area between a curve and the x-axis
Integrate simple polynomials to calculate the area under a curve between two x-values

lessons.title: Definite integrals and the area under a curve
